name: Application Deployment Performance & Reliability
description: Developer and SRE reliability, retry, failure-stage and latency telemetry for Clearent GitHub Actions deployment attempts.

markdown.markdownText:
# Application Deployment Performance & Reliability

One Kubernetes Event represents one GitHub Actions deployment job attempt. This dashboard answers deployment reliability, retry, failure-stage and latency questions.

## Included
- Attempt success, failure, retry and first-attempt success
- Total and Helm duration, failure stage and non-Helm time
- Environment, application and workload trends
- Deployment identity and Kubernetes Event context
- Agave versus legacy configuration as a deployment dimension

Detailed Agave contract snapshots are intentionally kept in the separate **Agave Contract & Synchronisation Health** dashboard.

The current event contract reports Agave configuration at deployment time; it does not yet report runtime synchronisation executions or API-call volume.

widgets.title: Retry Attempt Rate

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | aggregate count() as total, count_if($d.job_attempt:number > 1) as retries | create retry_rate from if(total > 0, retries / total * 100, 0) | choose retry_rate

widgets.description: Retry attempts divided by all deployment attempts in the selected timeframe.

widgets.title: Unparsed Deployment Events

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application == null | aggregate count() as unparsed_events

widgets.description: Clearent-shaped deployment Events that did not produce the parsed telemetry object. Historical Events ingested before the rule was enabled may be included.

widgets.title: Total Deployment Attempts

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | aggregate count() as total_attempts

widgets.description: One Event per GitHub Actions deployment job attempt, including retries.

widgets.title: Failed Deployment Attempts

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Failed' | aggregate count() as failed_attempts

widgets.description: All failed attempts, including failures before Helm starts.

widgets.title: Attempt Success Rate

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | aggregate count() as total, count_if($d.result == 'Succeeded') as succeeded | create success_rate from if(total > 0, succeeded / total * 100, 0) | choose success_rate

widgets.description: Succeeded attempts divided by all deployment attempts.

widgets.title: P95 Successful Attempt Duration

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | aggregate percentile(0.95, $d.total_duration_seconds:number) as p95_seconds

widgets.description: P95 measured deployment duration for successful attempts only.

widgets.title: Retry Attempts

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | aggregate count_if($d.job_attempt:number > 1) as retry_attempts

widgets.description: Attempts where GitHub Actions reports JobAttempt greater than one.

widgets.title: First-Attempt Success Rate

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.job_attempt:number == 1 | aggregate count() as total, count_if($d.result == 'Succeeded') as succeeded | create success_rate from if(total > 0, succeeded / total * 100, 0) | choose success_rate

widgets.description: Success rate for JobAttempt 1, excluding subsequent retries.

widgets.title: Pre-Helm Failures

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Failed' && $d.helm_result == 'NotStarted' | aggregate count() as pre_helm_failures

widgets.description: Failed attempts where validation or preparation stopped before Helm began.

widgets.title: P95 Helm Execution Duration

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.helm_result != 'NotStarted' | aggregate percentile(0.95, $d.helm_duration_seconds:number) as p95_helm_seconds

widgets.description: P95 Helm duration, excluding attempts where Helm never started.

custom.name: Deployment Attempt Health
custom.description: Attempt-level reliability, retry, parser-health and latency indicators.

widgets.title: Attempt Outcomes Over Time
widgets.description: Succeeded and failed deployment attempts over the selected timeframe.

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | groupby $d.result as result, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate count() as attempts

widgets.title: Failure Stage Over Time
widgets.description: Pre-Helm means Helm never started; Helm means Helm executed and failed.

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Failed' | create failure_stage from case { $d.helm_result == 'NotStarted' -> 'Pre-Helm', $d.helm_result == 'Failed' -> 'Helm', _ -> 'Post-Helm' } | groupby $d.failure_stage as failure_stage, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate count() as failed_attempts

widgets.title: Successful Attempt Duration Over Time

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate avg($d.total_duration_seconds:number) as average_seconds

source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate percentile(0.95, $d.total_duration_seconds:number) as p95_seconds

source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate max($d.total_duration_seconds:number) as maximum_seconds

widgets.description: End-to-end latency for successful deployment attempts only.

widgets.title: Helm Execution Duration Over Time

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.helm_result != 'NotStarted' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate avg($d.helm_duration_seconds:number) as average_helm_seconds

source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.helm_result != 'NotStarted' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate percentile(0.95, $d.helm_duration_seconds:number) as p95_helm_seconds

source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.helm_result != 'NotStarted' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate max($d.helm_duration_seconds:number) as maximum_helm_seconds

widgets.description: Helm latency for attempts where Helm started; excludes NotStarted zeroes.

custom.name: Reliability and Timing
custom.description: Attempt outcomes, failure stages and phase-aware latency.

widgets.title: Agave versus Tequila Successful Duration
widgets.description: Average successful attempt duration by deployment configuration mode.

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | create configuration_mode from if($d.agave_enabled == 'True', 'Agave', 'Tequila') | groupby $d.configuration_mode as configuration_mode, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate avg($d.total_duration_seconds:number) as average_seconds

widgets.title: Pipeline Overhead Over Time
widgets.description: Average successful-attempt time outside Helm, including validation, rendering and orchestration.

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | groupby $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate avg($d.total_duration_seconds:number - $d.helm_duration_seconds:number) as average_overhead_seconds

source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | groupby $d.environment as environment, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate count() as attempts

widgets.title: Attempt Volume by Workload Type

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | create workload_kind from if($d.object.regarding.kind != null, $d.object.regarding.kind, $d.regarding.kind) | groupby $d.workload_kind as workload_kind, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate count() as attempts

widgets.description: Deployment versus CronJob attempts from the wrapped Kubernetes Event context.

custom.name: Platform Behaviour
custom.description: Deployment orchestration, environment and workload behaviour.

widgets.title: Successful Duration by Application
widgets.description: Average successful attempt duration; up to 20 application series.

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | groupby $d.application as application, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate avg($d.total_duration_seconds:number) as average_seconds

source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | groupby $d.application as application, $m.timestamp / $p.timeRange.suggestedInterval as timestamp aggregate count() as attempts

custom.name: Application Analysis
custom.description: Successful latency and attempt volume by application.

widgets.title: Recent Deployment Attempt History
widgets.description: Core Clearent deployment fields and Kubernetes Event/cluster context. Detailed Agave contract fields are shown in the Agave dashboard.

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | create event_time from if($d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp != null, $d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp, $d.eventTime_custom_timestamp) | create event_reason from if($d.object.reason != null, $d.object.reason, $d.reason) | create event_type from if($d.object.type != null, $d.object.type, $d.type) | create workload_kind from if($d.object.regarding.kind != null, $d.object.regarding.kind, $d.regarding.kind) | create workload_name from if($d.object.regarding.name != null, $d.object.regarding.name, $d.regarding.name) | create workload_namespace from if($d.object.regarding.namespace != null, $d.object.regarding.namespace, $d.regarding.namespace)

widgets.title: Failed Deployment Attempts

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Failed' | create event_time from if($d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp != null, $d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp, $d.eventTime_custom_timestamp) | create event_reason from if($d.object.reason != null, $d.object.reason, $d.reason) | create event_type from if($d.object.type != null, $d.object.type, $d.type) | create workload_kind from if($d.object.regarding.kind != null, $d.object.regarding.kind, $d.regarding.kind) | create workload_name from if($d.object.regarding.name != null, $d.object.regarding.name, $d.regarding.name) | create workload_namespace from if($d.object.regarding.namespace != null, $d.object.regarding.namespace, $d.regarding.namespace)

widgets.description: Failed attempts with retry identity, lifecycle timestamps and workload context.

widgets.title: Slowest Successful Attempts

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.result == 'Succeeded' | create event_time from if($d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp != null, $d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp, $d.eventTime_custom_timestamp) | create event_reason from if($d.object.reason != null, $d.object.reason, $d.reason) | create event_type from if($d.object.type != null, $d.object.type, $d.type) | create workload_kind from if($d.object.regarding.kind != null, $d.object.regarding.kind, $d.regarding.kind) | create workload_name from if($d.object.regarding.name != null, $d.object.regarding.name, $d.regarding.name) | create workload_namespace from if($d.object.regarding.namespace != null, $d.object.regarding.namespace, $d.regarding.namespace) | create total_duration_seconds_num from $d.total_duration_seconds:number | orderby $d.total_duration_seconds_num desc | limit 100

widgets.description: Top 100 successful attempts by numeric measured deployment duration.

widgets.title: Retried Deployment Attempts

dataprimeQuery.text: source logs | filter ($d.object.note.startsWith('Application=') || $d.note.startsWith('Application=')) | filter $d.application != null | filter $d.job_attempt:number > 1 | create event_time from if($d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp != null, $d.object.eventTime_custom_timestamp, $d.eventTime_custom_timestamp) | create event_reason from if($d.object.reason != null, $d.object.reason, $d.reason) | create event_type from if($d.object.type != null, $d.object.type, $d.type) | create workload_kind from if($d.object.regarding.kind != null, $d.object.regarding.kind, $d.regarding.kind) | create workload_name from if($d.object.regarding.name != null, $d.object.regarding.name, $d.regarding.name) | create workload_namespace from if($d.object.regarding.namespace != null, $d.object.regarding.namespace, $d.regarding.namespace)

widgets.description: Attempts with JobAttempt greater than one, including the unique Azure job ID.

custom.name: Developer and SRE Investigation
custom.description: Attempt identity, phase timings and Kubernetes Event context.
